name: accessimind-accessible-ui-agent
description: General-purpose agentic WCAG 2.2 audit, evidence collection, screen-reader testing, and accessible UI implementation workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Agentic WCAG audits, crawler evidence, NVDA testing, accessible reports, and UI remediation.
interface.longDescription: AccessiMind Accessible UI Agent turns Codex into a general accessibility audit and remediation agent. It can crawl from a seed URL, collect WCAG 2.2 evidence with browser automation, keyboard traversal, visual measurements, target-size checks, and real NVDA screen-reader output when available, then generate detailed HTML reports, Jira-ready work, regression packs, and accessible UI fixes. Invoke the bundled skill with $accessimind.
defaultPrompt: Run an agentic WCAG audit from this URL.
Create an evidence-backed WCAG HTML report.
Test this flow with keyboard and a screen reader.
